title: equisetum × montellii
intro: Equisetum × montellii, also known as Horsetail, is a hybrid plant species within the Equisetum genus, characterized by its distinctive, hollow, and jointed stems. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Equisetum × montellii include improving kidney function, treating urinary tract infections, and reducing inflammation, as well as providing antioxidant and detoxifying effects. Equisetum × montellii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
